name: Best Chocolate Cake with Fudge Frosting
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces Unsweetened Chocolate, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 13 x 9 x 3 inch pan, or two 3-inch round pans, or two 9-inch round pans by greasing and flouring them.
3. In a large bowl, beat all ingredients except fudge frosting on low speed for 30 seconds, scraping the bowl constantly. Then beat on high speed for 3 minutes, scraping the bowl constantly. Pour batter into prepared pan(s).
4. Bake for 40-45 minutes in rectangle pan or 30-35 minutes in round pans until a wooden pick inserted comes out clean. Allow rounds to cool for 10 minutes before removing from pans and letting them cool completely.
5. Frost with Fudge Frosting.
Fudge Frosting:
2 cups Sugar
1/2 cup Shortening
3 oz Unsweetened Chocolate, melted and cooled
2/3 cup Milk
1/2 teaspoon Salt
2 teaspoons Vanilla Extract
Combine all ingredients (except vanilla) in a 2-1/2 quart saucepan. Heat to a rolling boil, stirring occasionally. Boil for 1 minute without stirring. Remove from heat and place in a bowl of ice water. Beat until frosting is smooth and reaches spreading consistency; add vanilla extract.
